name: ExtensionEndpoint_Description
title: R5: Additional details about the endpoint that could be displayed as further information to identify the description beyond its name (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Endpoint.description` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Endpoint.description` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Endpoint.description` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Endpoint.description` has a context of Endpoint based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Endpoint`.
Element `Endpoint.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Additional details about the endpoint that could be displayed as further information to identify the description beyond its name (new)

element.short: Additional details about the endpoint that could be displayed as further information to identify the description beyond its name
element.definition: The description of the endpoint and what it is for (typically used as supplemental information in an endpoint directory describing its usage/purpose).
